categories.def: a piece of cutlery with a shallow bowl-shaped container and a handle
categories.name: spoon

categories.def: small rounded bread either plain or sweet
categories.name: bun

categories.def: a dish that is round and open at the top for serving foods
categories.name: bowl

categories.def: a shaker with a perforated top for sprinkling salt
categories.name: saltshaker

categories.def: a container for holding liquids while drinking
categories.name: glass_(drink_container)

categories.def: dish on which food is served or from which food is eaten
categories.name: plate

categories.def: an open receptacle for holding or displaying or serving articles or food
categories.name: tray

categories.def: pungent seasoning from the berry of the common pepper plant; whole or ground
categories.name: pepper

categories.def: cutlery used for serving and eating food
categories.name: fork

categories.def: a small open container usually used for drinking; usually has a handle
categories.name: cup

categories.def: plant with dense clusters of tight green flower buds
categories.name: broccoli

categories.def: square or bar of very rich chocolate cake usually with nuts
categories.name: brownie

categories.def: any of various juicy fruit with green or purple skins; grow in clusters
categories.name: grape
